violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergy warning for consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

At the time of inspection, a person certified in food safety was not on site. Establishment is to employ an on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

Reduced Oxygen Packaged Lobster was observed thawing in its intact packaging in the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Lobster was sliced open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
